CORRECTED SOURCE OF REPORT. A EF-0 TORNADO/WATERSPOUT MOVED FROM THE SOUTHERN PART OF PINE ISLAND AT 1019 AM TO LAKES REGIONAL PARK IN FORT MYERS AT 1040 AM. TIME BASED ON RADAR. ONE MOBILE HOME DESTROYED, DAMAGE TO TREES AND CAR PORTS, AND A METAL DOCK LIFTED OUT OF THE WATER AT LAKES REGIONAL PARK. A SPECIAL THANKS TO EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT AND THE MEDIA FOR THE PHOTOS AND VIDEO.
